ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laser_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laser product */,
  "output_power_w" REAL /* Output power of the laser product in Watts */,
  "operation_mode" TEXT /* Operational mode of the laser (e.g., Continuous Wave, Q-Switched) */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Cooling method employed (e.g., actively cooled, passively cooled) */,
  "collimation_type" TEXT /* Type of collimation used */,
  "heatsink_type" TEXT /* Type of heatsink used for thermal management */,
  "data_sheet" TEXT /* File name of the data sheet associated with the product */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the product specifications */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the laser product */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number for each specific unit of the product */,
  "warranty_period_months" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laser_products_cooling_type FOREIGN KEY ("cooling_type") REFERENCES cooling_methods ("cooling_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laser_products_heatsink_type FOREIGN KEY ("heatsink_type") REFERENCES heatsinks ("heatsink_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laser_products_operation_mode FOREIGN KEY ("operation_mode") REFERENCES operation_modes ("operation_mode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laser_products_collimation_type FOREIGN KEY ("collimation_type") REFERENCES collimation_types ("collimation_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "cooling_methods" (
  "cooling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cooling method */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Name of the cooling method (e.g., passively cooled, actively cooled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cooling method */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the cooling method */,
  "operational_cost" REAL /* Annual operational cost of the cooling method */,
  "maintenance_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of maintenance required in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cooling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation mode */,
  "operation_mode" TEXT /* Name of the operation mode (e.g., CW, QCW) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the operation mode */,
  "power_consumption_w" REAL /* Power consumption in Watts */,
  "laser_lifetime_hours" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of the laser in hours */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions under which the operation mode is suitable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collimation_types" (
  "collimation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collimation type */,
  "collimation_type" TEXT /* Name of the collimation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the collimation process */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the collimation in micrometers */,
  "beam_diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the beam in millimeters */,
  "focal_length_mm" REAL /* Focal length in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collimation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heatsinks" (
  "heatsink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heatsink type */,
  "heatsink_type" TEXT /* Name of the heatsink type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the heatsink design */,
  "thermal_resistance_k_w" REAL /* Thermal resistance in K/W */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the heatsink */,
  "dimensions_mm" TEXT /* Dimensions of the heatsink in millimeters (width x height x depth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heatsink_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laser product associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product specification */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the version release */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES laser_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasheets" (
  "datasheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datasheet record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laser product to which this datasheet belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the datasheet */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the datasheet was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the datasheet file in MB */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the datasheet file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datasheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES laser_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laser product tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test conducted */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results from the testing procedures */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or observations */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during testing */,
  "test_duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES laser_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, product manager, QA) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES laser_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laser product associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments regarding the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "usage_context" TEXT /* Context in which the product was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES laser_products ("product_id")
)
